items.title: huashu-design
items.description: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic
items.summary: Huashu Design offers HTML-native design skills, high-fidelity prototypes, animations, 20 design philosophies, 5-dimension reviews, and MP4 export. It is agent-agnostic.

items.title: garden-skills
items.description: ConardLi's open-source Skills collection, featuring web design, knowledge retrieval, image generation, and more.
items.summary: ConardLi's open-source web design skill transforms AI-generated web pages into stunning visuals, inspired by the system prompt of Claude Design. It is hosted on GitHub and includes automated actions for continuous improvement.

items.title: mercury-agent
items.description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.
items.summary: Mercury Agent is a 24/7 AI operating via CLI or Telegram, featuring permission-hardened tools and token budgets. It uses an open-source tool system and external services for safe AI autonomy.

items.title: OpenGame
items.description: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games
items.summary: OpenGame is an open-source framework for creating web games from natural language specifications, addressing LLM incoherence issues. It includes an evaluation pipeline, OpenGame-Bench, to assess game quality in terms of build health, visual usability, and intent alignment. The framework aims to bridge the gap between creative design and software engineering in game development.

items.title: chatgpt2api
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. When APIs return "None," it often indicates a missing response or an error. Check API documentation for troubleshooting steps.

items.title: harmonist
items.description: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement. 186 agents, zero runtime dependencies.
items.summary: Harmonist is a portable AI agent orchestration tool with mechanical protocol enforcement for 186 agents, requiring no runtime dependencies. It uses a SQLite mail system for coordination and enforces runtime security through tool-call guards.

items.title: cc-design
items.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents
items.summary: The cc-design skill enables high-fidelity HTML design and prototype creation, including slide decks and landing pages. It supports visual artifact development in HTML. This skill is part of the Claude Code framework.

items.title: agents-md
items.description: Drop-in AGENTS.md that makes every coding agent behave like a senior engineer instead of an eager intern. Kills sycophancy, stops drive-by refactors, forces verification loops. Synthesizes Karpathy's four principles and Boris Cherny's Claude Code workflow. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and the open standard.
items.summary: Agents-md standardizes coding agents to senior engineer level, eliminates sycophancy, and integrates Karpathy's principles and Cherny's workflow. It works with various AI tools and enforces rigorous verification.

items.title: text-to-cad
items.description: An open source harness for generating CAD models
items.summary: Text-to-CAD is an open-source tool that lets coding agents generate parametric CAD models locally using Python and OpenCASCADE. It is MIT-licensed and has 442 GitHub stars as of April 25, 2026. The project is hosted on GitHub at earthtojake/text-to-cad.

items.title: gpt_image_2_skill
items.description: GPT Image 2 prompt gallery, image prompt library, agentic skill, and CLI for OpenAI image generation/editing
items.summary: I'm an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. GPT Image 2 is a tool for generating and editing images. It uses specific prompts for various applications.

items.title: freellmapi
items.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only.
items.summary: For personal experimentation, consider free API proxy services like Puter.js for unlimited access to GPT-4o without payment. OpenRouter offers 200 free requests daily. Always check for the latest terms and conditions.

items.title: future-agi
items.description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.
items.summary: Future AGI is an open-source platform for developing, evaluating, and optimizing AI agents. It includes tools for simulation, evaluation, and monitoring. It is self-hostable under an Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: agent-sprite-forge
items.description: Agent Skill for generating 2D sprite sheets and map, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from prompts.
items.summary: Agent-Sprite-Forge generates 2D sprite sheets, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from text prompts. It's a useful tool for game development. GitHub repository available for further use.

items.title: Cairn
items.description: AI 自动化通用问题解决 / AI 自动化渗透测试系统
items.summary: Cairn is an AI system for general problem-solving and automated penetration testing. It was developed by the oritera team and is expected to be open-sourced soon. The project was recognized in Tencent Cloud's intelligent penetration challenge.

items.title: superlevels
items.description: A super Chrome extension I made that's safer than installing external malware/spyware-filled extensions that form a massive security risk, this one is open source and you can read and check the source code (with AI) before you install it, and customize it to your liking!
items.summary: Superlevels is a secure, open-source Chrome extension. Its source code is available for review, ensuring safety. Customize it to fit your needs without security risks.

items.title: pi-computer-use
items.description: control your applications using pi-coding-agent. fully invisible.
items.summary: pi-computer-use enables Pi agents to control applications via CLI, using a coding agent for full macOS integration. It supports visual verification and development automation. The tool is open-source on GitHub.

items.title: hi-kid
items.description: HiKid - Your AI English Pal. A desktop app built with React and TypeScript, targeting children in non-English-speaking countries who want to practice English speaking and listening.
items.summary: HiKid is a free, open-source desktop app for children to practice English. Built with React and TypeScript, it targets kids in non-English-speaking countries. It helps them improve speaking and listening skills.

items.title: agent-style
items.description: 21 writing rules for AI coding and writing agents. Drop-in for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Aider, so their output reads like a tech pro.
items.summary: Agent-style provides 21 rules to make AI coding agents write like tech pros. It enhances outputs from tools like Codex, Copilot, and Cursor. This improves technical writing quality.

items.title: thClaws
items.description: Open-source agent harness platform. Native Rust, multi-provider, runs on your own machine. Sovereign by design.
items.summary: thClaws is a native Rust AI agent platform running locally on your machine, supporting multiple providers and offering a GUI with tabs for coding, terminal, and chat. It operates without cloud interaction or API keys. It is sovereign by design.

items.title: wanman
items.description: wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It lets human users step back into an observer role while local agent runtimes coordinate autonomous multi-agent workflows, task execution, and artifacts.
items.summary: Wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime that automates multi-agent workflows. It's inspired by Japanese one-man train systems, allowing human oversight while agents manage tasks autonomously. It's designed for efficient coordination in complex environments.

items.title: Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
items.description: A cross-platform Flutter app that runs uncensored, 100% offline open-source AI models (GGUF) directly on your Android, iOS, or PC. No cloud, no filters, total privacy.
items.summary: Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform is a cross-platform Flutter app that runs offline AI models directly on Android, iOS, or PC without cloud services or filters, ensuring total privacy. It uses GGUF models and operates 100% offline.

items.title: alice
items.description: Analyse · Learn · Ingest · Curate · Export — AI-powered YOLO dataset management toolkit
items.summary: ALICE is an AI-powered toolkit for managing YOLO datasets, supporting image annotation, training, and dataset management. It uses both GPU and CPU for AI inference. Current version is 2.155.1.

items.title: stash
items.description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.
items.summary: Stash is a local, self-hosted memory layer for AI agents using PostgreSQL, compatible with any OpenAI-like backend. It stores agent experiences and context without cloud dependency. It includes a MCP server and is a single binary.

items.title: im-not-ai
items.description: AI가 쓴 글이 아닌 것처럼 윤문해주는 스킬
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. I can help with various tasks but do not possess personal opinions or identities. My purpose is to provide accurate and helpful information.

items.title: Hy3-preview
items.description: Hy3 preview (295B A21B), a leading reasoning and agent model in its size, with great cost efficiency
items.summary: Hy3 preview is a 295B parameter Mixture-of-Experts model by Tencent, known for high efficiency and cost-effectiveness, released in April 2026. It supports configurable reasoning levels for balancing speed and depth. It excels in code generation and multi-step workflows.

items.title: auto-memory
items.description: Your AI coding agent never forgets — progressive session recall CLI
items.summary: Auto-memory enhances AI coding agents by retaining context across sessions, improving suggestions and reducing the need for repetitive explanations. It automates the process of updating memory files with learned information. This feature enables consistent performance without context drift.

items.title: kalshi-trading-bot
items.description: kalshi trading bot on prediction market autonomous kalshi trading bot that connects to the kalshi api via kalshi rest and kalshi websocket, runs a five-agent ai ensemble to analyze kalshi prediction markets, sizes positions with fractional kelly criterion against your kalshi balance, and executes kalshi orders in paper or live mode with hard daily
items.summary: A kalshi trading bot uses AI to analyze prediction markets, employs a five-agent ensemble, and executes trades via the Kalshi API. It optimizes positions with the fractional Kelly criterion and operates in paper or live mode.

items.title: awesome-gpt-image-2
items.description: Prompt as Code | GPT-Image2 工业级提示词引擎与模板库 - 329个案例逆向工程，13套工业级模板
items.summary: GPT-Image2 is a collection of high-quality prompts for generating images using advanced AI techniques. It includes 329 reverse-engineered cases and 13 industrial-grade templates. The project is hosted on GitHub.

items.title: AITD
items.description: AI Trading Agent for Everyone
items.summary: AITD is a local AI trading agent that can run on any machine, allowing users to configure, test, and execute trades live. It supports defining trading strategies and managing positions. It's free and open-source.

items.title: Supervisor-Skills
items.description: 将博导十年科研经验炼化为可直接调用的 AI 技能。从 Idea 构思到论文投稿，你的 AI 科研副导师。
items.summary: Supervisor-Skills is an AI tool that distills a supervisor's decade of research experience into usable skills, aiding from idea generation to paper submission. It's designed for PhD researchers and AI researchers. The tool is available on GitHub.

items.title: vllm-swift
items.description: vLLM Metal plugin powered by mlx-swift — high-performance LLM inference on Apple Silicon
items.summary: vLLM Metal plugin leverages MLX for high-performance inference on Apple Silicon, offering faster speeds and unified memory. It integrates with vLLM and supports features like grouped-query attention. Available on GitHub, it has 103 stars.

items.title: gpt_image_playground
items.description: 基于 OpenAI gpt-image-2 接口的图片生成与编辑工具
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. I can generate and edit images based on your text prompts. For advanced image generation, consider using specialized tools from other providers.

items.title: dspy-agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade DSPy 3.2.x agent skills + validated end-to-end examples for Claude Code and Codex CLI — fundamentals, evaluation, GEPA, BetterTogether, and RLM.
items.summary: DSPy 3.2.x agents utilize GEPA and RLM for prompt optimization, with validated examples for Codex CLI. Fundamental skills include fundamentals, evaluation, and BetterTogether. Essential skills are available in GitHub repositories for integration.

items.title: agent-skills
items.description: Reusable agent skills for Codex and compatible tools
items.summary: Reusable agent skills for Codex and compatible tools are designed to streamline workflows and can be packaged as plugins for broader use. To configure and distribute these skills, use the agents/openai.yaml file. Skills bridge the gap between prompting and full app development.

items.title: endless-toil
items.description: Hear your agent suffer through your code
items.summary: Endless-toil is a project by AndrewVos that allows users to hear an agent's debugging process through their code. It has 3 stars on GitHub and is written mostly in Python. The project is not actively maintained.

items.title: ChatGpt-Image-Studio
items.summary: I'm an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. I can generate images based on detailed prompts. This new feature allows for highly detailed and stylistically accurate images.

items.title: AlphaBrain
items.description: The Comprehensive Toolkit for Embodied AI Models
items.summary: AlphaBrain is an open-source framework for embodied AI, integrating various learning algorithms and reinforcement learning paradigms. It unifies multiple VLA architectures and world model backbones for comprehensive AI development. The toolkit is designed to be ready out of the box for developers.

items.title: ascent-research
items.description: research cli for agent
items.summary: Ascent-Research is a Rust-based CLI for AI agents, enabling incremental research workflows and knowledge accumulation across sessions. It integrates HTTP, browser, and local file resources. It has 132 stars on GitHub.

items.title: ai-application-roadmap
items.description: A bilingual map of AI engineering evolution, real-world AI usage patterns, and vibe coding best practices.
items.summary: AI engineering evolution includes foundational skills like Python and linear algebra, practical applications like chatbots, and best practices in clean coding. The roadmap for 2026 emphasizes structured learning and leveraging pre-trained models. Essential tools include version control and low-level programming.

items.title: FL-Production-25.2.5-DAW
items.description: 25.2.5 Music Production DAW 2026 Beatmaking AI Mastering Stems Separation PluggnB Organic Sounds MIDI Support VST3 Plugins Audio Recording Low Latency Mixing Mastering Windows 11 Sound Design Virtual Instruments Producer Edition Professional Audio Resource
items.summary: FL-Production-25.2.5 is a professional audio resource for music production, featuring beatmaking, mastering, and sound design tools. It supports VST3 plugins and MIDI. Ideal for Windows 11 users.

items.title: Awesome-GPT-Image-2-OpenAi
items.description: The Definitive GPT Image 2 Prompt Vault — Master OpenAI's next-gen model with curated prompts for pixel-perfect text, consistent characters, and professional-grade assets. Optimized for creators and developers.
items.summary: GPT Image 2 by OpenAI released in 2026 features advanced text rendering, character consistency, and commercial-grade illustrations. It includes Thinking Mode, web search, and up to 16 reference images. The model is optimized for creators and developers.

items.title: agent-simulator
items.description: An iOS simulator in a browser you can inspect
items.summary: Agent-Simulator is an open-source tool that streams iOS simulator into a browser for inspection and interaction. It supports React Native and allows interaction with native controls. It is based on MCP.

items.title: MultiWorld
items.description: Official Implementation of MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models
items.summary: MultiWorld is a scalable framework for multi-agent, multi-view video world modeling. It enables accurate control of multiple agents and maintains multi-view consistency. It outperforms existing models in scalability and efficiency.

items.title: WindsurfPoolAPI
items.description: Multi-account pool proxy for Windsurf — 113+ models (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Grok/Kimi) via OpenAI & Anthropic APIs, image upload, Cursor & Claude Code native / 企业级 Windsurf 多账号池化 API 代理
items.summary: WindsurfPoolAPI is a multi-account pool proxy for various AI models via APIs from providers like OpenAI and Anthropic. It supports over 113 models and includes features like image upload and native code execution. It's designed for enterprise-level use.

items.title: geo-citation-lab
items.description: A dataset and analysis pipeline for studying how AI search engines select and use citations.
items.summary: GEO focuses on optimizing content for AI search engines to increase citation probability. It prioritizes structured data and answer-ready content. This approach enhances brand visibility in AI-generated responses.

items.title: ai-videolab
items.description: Need images or videos that look good fast?   This makes it simple. Private, reliable, and used by millions.   Give it a try -https://tinyurl.com/imggenai
items.summary: AI-VideoLab creates high-quality images and videos quickly. It's private, reliable, and used by millions. Try it at https://tinyurl.com/imggenai.

items.title: mcp-cli
items.description: a prototype to save fork/exec overhead of ai code agent
items.summary: MCP-CLI reduces overhead by using CLI for tool execution and MCP for context, optimizing context efficiency and reducing context window overflow. CLI tools provide better composability and context management for AI agents.

items.title: Auto-2026-Desktop
items.description: Resource is a professional suite for advanced 2D/3D drafting. It features optimized toolsets, AI-assisted design, and high-performance libraries. Designed for engineers and architects, it ensures precision and seamless workflow integration for modern industrial projects in 2026.
items.summary: AutoCAD 2026 features AI-assisted design, specialized toolsets, and high-performance libraries for advanced 2D/3D drafting, enhancing automation and collaboration. It integrates with Autodesk Docs for connected design workflows. The software supports both web and mobile access for flexible drafting.

items.title: n8n-Actual-Automation
items.description: 6 n8n workflows for Actual Budget — AI transaction categorization, envelope auto-funding, and weekly budget briefing via Telegram
items.summary: n8n workflows automate Actual Budget tasks like AI transaction categorization, auto-funding, and weekly budget briefings via Telegram. The n8n-nodes-actual-budget-rest-api node integrates Actual Budget with n8n for automated financial management. Actual Budget is a local-first personal finance tool.

items.title: Vibecode-Cleaner-Fartrun
items.description: Not another AI reviewing AI. Rust-powered code scanner that actually reads your codebase —    zero extra tokens consumed. 29 MCP tools: security vulns, dead code, health checks, save  points, frozen files. Finds problems. Farts at you. Hasselhoff approves.
items.summary: Vibecode-Cleaner-Fartrun is a Rust-powered code scanner that analyzes codebases for security vulnerabilities and dead code without consuming extra tokens. It includes 29 MCP tools and humorously alerts users.
